label: RAG CHATBOT
title: Chat with my work
description: An in-site RAG chatbot seeded with a structured knowledge base about Dan’s work history and projects. Responses include the specific source chunk used, and it refuses to invent details when the knowledge base doesn’t have the answer.

meta.proudOf: Making the portfolio interactive — you can ask questions and see grounded, cited answers
meta.learned: Operational details matter: logging, citations, and knowledge hygiene make or break trust

sections.label: CONTEXT
sections.heading: What this is
sections.content:
This is a retrieval-augmented chatbot for gundy.io. It answers questions about my work history and projects using only a curated knowledge base.

If it can’t find relevant info, it will say so clearly rather than guessing.

Below is the live demo.

sections.label: DEMO
sections.heading: Ask anything
sections.content:
Try asking about specific projects (e.g. **Entitlements Management**, **Self-Serve Trial**, **STS Launch**) or about roles and areas like pricing & packaging.

**Note**: This is a prototype. Messages are stored for quality improvements.

chatbot.title: Chat with Dan
chatbot.description: Ask about roles, projects, and outcomes. Answers are grounded in a knowledge base and include sources.
